item.name: Ogre Eel
item.description:
Even when it finds itself dangling from an angler's line, its only thought is to consume as much flesh as possible, which causes many a fisher to cast it back into the sea in sheer panic.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: Insatiable in its appetites, this species of eel tends to be fattier than the varieties found in other parts of Eorzea. If they knew what people on land were calling them, perhaps they would save some of the ocean's prey for the other hungry fish.
